zh.lifeSummary: 當William Beaumont於大約1047年出生在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾布格時，他的父親Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen26歲，母親Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan34歲。他和Hawise de Portchester至少有2個兒子。他去世於1101年在英國英格蘭哈普爾素坦普頓享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Beaumont was born about 1047, in Neubourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, his father, Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen, was 26 and his mother, Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan, was 34. He had at least 2 sons with Hawise de Portchester. He died in 1101, in Southampton, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Beaumont est né environ 1047, à Neubourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, son père, Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Hawise de Portchester. Il est décédé en 1101, à Southampton, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Beaumont um 1047 in Neubourg, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen 26 und seine Mutter Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan 34. Er hatte mit Hawise de Portchester mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1101 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Southampton, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Beaumont è nato il circa 1047 nel Neubourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, il suo padre, Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Hawise de Portchester. Morì nel 1101, nel Southampton, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Beaumont(이)가 대략 1047년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 니우보우르그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Hawise de Portchester(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1101년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 소우섬프턴에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Beaumont родился около 1047 г. в местности неубург, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan, 34. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Hawise de Portchester. Он умер в 1101 г. в местности соутамптон, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.
